metadata.title:
THE ROADS
PAY OVER


10 PER CENT

OF THE MONEY PAID INTO


COUNTY TREASURY
$298,348 THE FIGURES

pages.raw_text:
Of the $2,soe,424.11 to be paid
into the county treasury for taxes
next year, $29s, 34s.oe, or over 10
per cent Of the total, will come
from the Golfers Of the steam and
electric transportation lines Of the
county.


The Washington Water Power
Co. will contribute S39,070.93 to the
county. sS491.66 on real estate and
$30,529.27 on personal property,
which includes rolling stock, etc.
The Spokane & Inland Empire, the
other electric line of the county,
will pay in taxes $39,003.79, $24,-
678.02 on real estate and $12.325.77
on personal property. 1t will be
noticed that while the totals are
almost identical, there Is a great diff
ference in teh apportionment.


The Northern Pacific, with it's
branches, is the largest railroad
taxpayer in the county, $96,214.58
representing the money it will ex-
pend in 1910 for taxes. Its real
estate pays tax aggregating $751;
60616.


The Great Northern with. it's
branches, will pay $S4,509.38 in
taxes, of which $78,6S4.99 will be
from the real estate levy.


The o. r. & n. will pay $685.
625.41, of which $33,S10.57 Is on
realty.


The Spokane International trails
the list with only $3531.4S for real
estate and $392.52 for personal
property.
